subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and read with care. It is a clear proof of steadfastness in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه شما رسید و بدقت قرائت گردید دلیل جلیل بر استقامت بر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
